title: HOUSING ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: BRADLEY ANGLE HOUSING ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides housing assistance. Assistance is based on funding availability and capacity. Assistance may involve helping survivors to: -Leave a dangerous place -Secure emergency safe nights and shelter access -Retain safe housing with eviction prevention -Transition to long-term or permanent housing -Emotional support, safety planning, and systems navigation support -Help with 14-day lease break letters -Address Confidentiality Program applications -Discussing housing options Eligibility: Survivors of domestic violence within the last 180 calendar days. May offer additional services for Black, African-American, and LGBTQ2+ survivors of domestic violence when available. Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm Email (503) 232-1528 303 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 232-1528 ext 303 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and intake. If receiving a voicemail prompt when calling, provide all of the following: name, number, and permission that it is safe to receive a callback. All return calls will be from a blocked number. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 4 and 72 stop at N Killingsworth Street and N Albina Avenue Services: Housing Search Assistance * Domestic Violence Issues Housing Search Assistance * Domestic Violence Issues * African American Community Housing Search Assistance * Domestic Violence Issues * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MARTHA'S FOLX MONEY MANAGEMENT - ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT MUTUAL SUPPORT - HEALING ROOTS & KINSHIP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
